══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Shifter — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Shifter — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Shifter — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Shifter — Iron Concentration HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Shifter — Iron Concentration --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Shifter — Iron Concentration --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 172/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 172/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Shifter — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Shifter — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Shifter — Iron Concentration HP: 36/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):18+8=26 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Shifter — Iron Concentration HP: 20/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):18+8=26 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Shifter — Iron Concentration HP: -2/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):12+8=20 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
